property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot in;C:\windows\Sun\Java in;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;c:\Users\idasu\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\idasu\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\idasu\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot in;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2025buntime\win64;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2025b in;C:\Users\idasu\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\idasu\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\idasu\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\idasu\AppData\Local\Python in;C:\Users\idasu\OneDrive\Desktop\Folders\Program Files - Java\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;c:\Users\idasu\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Create a project with valid data
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Create a project with valid data &amp#27;[90m# features/US01_CreateProject.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 156 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"User Story 1"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Test project for US01"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m201&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Mon, 16 Mar 2026 03:19:58 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Server: Jetty(9.4.z-SNAPSHOT)
{ "projects": [ { "id": "156", "title": "User Story 1", "completed": "false", "active": "false", "description": "Test project for US01" } ] } &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project title should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"User Story 1"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_title(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Create a project with only title
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Create a project with only title &amp#27;[90m# features/US01_CreateProject.feature:17&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 157 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Only title project"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m201&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Mon, 16 Mar 2026 03:19:58 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Server: Jetty(9.4.z-SNAPSHOT)
{ "projects": [ { "id": "157", "title": "Only title project", "completed": "false", "active": "false", "description": "" } ] } &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project title should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Only title project"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_title(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Create a project with only description
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Create a project with only description &amp#27;[90m# features/US01_CreateProject.feature:24&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 158 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Only description here!"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m201&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project description should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Only description here!"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_description(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Create a project with an invalid input
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Create a project with an invalid input &amp#27;[90m# features/US01_CreateProject.feature:31&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 159 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Invalid completed"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Testing Error"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI set the completed status of project to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"not a boolean"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.set_completed_input(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m400&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe error message should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Failed Validation: completed should be BOOLEAN"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_error_message(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Add a valid task to the project
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add a valid task to the project &amp#27;[90m# features/US02_AddTasks.feature:11&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 160 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US2 Project"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project_and(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m DEBUG US2: ProjectID=160 TaskID=64 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI add a task with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"TestTask"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.add_task_to_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m201&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe task should appear under the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_task_added()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Add a task with title and description
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add a task with title and description &amp#27;[90m# features/US02_AddTasks.feature:17&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 161 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US2 Project"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project_and(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m DEBUG US2: ProjectID=161 TaskID=65 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI add a task with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"TestTask2"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Task 2 adding testing"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.add_task_to_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m201&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe task should appear under the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_task_added()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Add a task with to a non existent project
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add a task with to a non existent project &amp#27;[90m# features/US02_AddTasks.feature:23&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 162 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US2 Project"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project_and(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI try to add a task &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"FailedTest"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to the project &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"999"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.add_task_project_id(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe error message should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Could not find parent thing for relationship projects/999/tasks"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_error_message(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Delete done task from project
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Delete done task from project &amp#27;[90m# features/US03_DeleteTasks.feature:12&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 163 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US3 Project"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project_and(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m DEBUG US2: ProjectID=163 TaskID=66 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI add a task with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US3 Task"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.add_task_to_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe task is marked as completed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_task_completed()&amp#27;[0m Delete Status: 200 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the task from the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.delete_task_from_project()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe task should not appear under the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_task_gone()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Change project description &amp#27;[90m# features/US04_UpdateProject.feature:11&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 166 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US4 Project"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Original description"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI update the project description to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"New description"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.update_description(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project description should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"New description"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_description(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Change the description to none

testcase.name: Change description of a non existent project
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Change description of a non existent project &amp#27;[90m# features/US04_UpdateProject.feature:23&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 168 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US4 Project"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Original description"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI update the project &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"999"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m description to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Error New description"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.update_description_id(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe error message should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Invalid GUID for 999 entity project"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_error_message(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Delete project that is completed
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Delete project that is completed &amp#27;[90m# features/US05_DeleteProject.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 169 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"US5 Project"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Original description"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project is marked as completed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.set_completed()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.delete_project()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project should not appear under the projects list&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_project_gone()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Delete project that is not completed

testcase.name: Double delete project that is completed
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Double delete project that is completed &amp#27;[90m# features/US05_DeleteProject.feature:26&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe todo manager service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.check_service_running()&amp#27;[0m Captued ID: 171 &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a project with title &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Error Project"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and description &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Original description"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.create_project(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project is marked as completed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.set_completed()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.delete_project()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project should not appear under the projects list&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_project_gone()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.delete_project()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m404&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# PartB.stepdefinitions.StepDefinitions.verify_status_code(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Delete non existent project
